title: Project Cleanup
description: This Texturepacks aims to remove all the flashing white GUI containers and replaces them with a clean black and white look.
body:
What does it do?
This Pack replaces the bright containers of Minecraft with Black, White and Transparent ones. All the backgrounds are transperent while for example idle buttons are black and are only white if hovered. 

 

What are our goals
Our goal is to clean up the GUI textures of vanilla Minecraft and to simplify them right away. We are also aiming to make this compatible with big mods like the included ones: Botania, REI or Travelers Backpacks.

 

Updates?
We are trying to update the resource pack regularly and listen to the community. 

 


Please note that the REI menu on the right side of some ingame previews is a mod and NOT part of the texture pack.

 
Also don't mind visiting us on https://linktr.ee/rethoughttextures
